steps.expected: Headline metrics render at the top of the report page
steps.observed: The report opened with Completion rate 68%, Abandonment rate 19%, Median steps 7, and Median duration 188 sec.

evidence.network: The populated report route rendered headline metrics immediately on /studies/demo-study/report.

steps.expected: Cards appear in ranked order with the required visible fields
steps.observed: The page rendered #1 blocker and #2 minor issue cards with What broke, Where, Affected segments, Evidence thumbnails, quotes, Replay confidence, Recommendation, and Confidence note sections.

evidence.network: Two ranked issue cards were visible in numbered order on the report route.

assertions.title: Evidence Screenshots Link to Full Resolution

steps.action: Inspect evidence thumbnails on the report card
steps.expected: Each thumbnail links to a full-resolution artifact
steps.observed: The report card exposed clickable evidence thumbnails.

steps.action: Open the first evidence thumbnail in a new tab
steps.observed: The browser opened a new tab with the full-resolution SVG data URL and rendered the larger artifact preview.

evidence.network: Evidence thumbnail href resolved to a full-resolution data:image SVG opened in a new tab.

assertions.title: Data Consistency Across Views

steps.action: Try to inspect the same study across overview, runs, findings, and report views
steps.expected: A completed study would render consistently across all four tabs
steps.observed: The fresh org had no completed study, and the demo-study overview tab crashed with an ArgumentValidationError while runs/findings/report used canned demo data.

evidence.consoleErrors: demo-study overview route threw an ArgumentValidationError for invalid studyId
evidence.network: Cross-view comparison could not be completed because the overview tab did not load for demo-study and no live completed study existed.

assertions.issues: Blocked: there was no single live completed study that could be compared across overview, runs, findings, and report.

frictions.description: The only populated report available from the browser was the direct /studies/demo-study/report route; the live fresh org had no analyzed study to navigate to.
frictions.resolution: Used the populated demo route for route/UI validation and blocked the true cross-view consistency assertion.

blockers.description: The demo-study overview route is broken, preventing a full four-tab consistency check even on the built-in demo surface.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Loaded /studies/demo-study/overview directly; the same Convex validation error reappeared.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 3 passed on the report route UI, 0 failed, and 1 was blocked because no single completed study could be compared across all four views.
